ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.description: Your ElevenLabs API key from [Profile > API Keys](https://elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys)

ELEVENLABS_AGENT_ID.description: Your ElevenLabs Conversational AI agent ID

ELEVENLABS_PHONE_NUMBER_ID.description: The Twilio phone number ID linked in your ElevenLabs agent

TRANSFER_NUMBER.description: Your phone number in E.164 format (e.g. `+15551234567`) — calls transfer here when a human is needed

USER_NAME.description: Your name — the agent introduces itself as "[name]'s assistant"

MCP_AUTH_TOKEN.description: A shared secret to authenticate Poke. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`
